name: canshare-tnm8-female-genital-ovary-fallopian-peritoneal-cm
title: NZ AJCC (8th edition) female genital ovary and/or fallopian tube and/or primary peritoneal carcinoma clinical M category
description: A clinical distant metastasis stage (cM) of a ovary, fallopian tube and/or primary peritoneal carcinoma before initiation of treatment, using the AJCC cancer staging manual (8th edition).
